description: A way of reaching people, such as Email, SMS, WhatsApp, or Telegram. Enable or disable a channel here, and choose whether it appears as a contact option for instructors on the portal.

fields.description: Show this channel as a contact icon on instructor / course pages, letting portal users reach the instructor on it.
fields.label: Portal-contactable

fields.description: Optional public deep-link prefix, e.g. https://wa.me/ or https://t.me/ — appended with the contact's address to open the external app directly. Leave blank for channels with no public deep link (the icon then routes through the logged comms inbox).
fields.label: Deep-link Prefix

fields.description: Paste raw SVG markup for the channel icon (rendered inline on contact icons).
fields.label: SVG Icon

name: Communication Channel
